# Amazon Bedrock Overview - Complete Content Extraction

## Service Definition
**Amazon Bedrock** is a fully managed service providing secure, enterprise-grade access to high-performing foundation models from leading AI companies, enabling users to build and scale generative AI applications.

---

## Supported APIs

### 1. Responses API (OpenAI Compatible)
### 2. Chat Completions API (OpenAI Compatible)
### 3. Invoke API (Boto3)
### 4. Converse API (Boto3)

---

## Supported Foundation Models (100+)

### Featured Models (as of April 2026):
- **Nova 2** (Amazon)
- **Claude Opus 4.6** (Anthropic)
- **Claude Sonnet 4.6** (Anthropic)
- **DeepSeek V3.2** (DeepSeek)
- **Kimi K2.5** (Moonshot AI)
- **MiniMax M2.1** (MiniMax)
- **GPT-OSS-20B** (OpenAI)
- **GLM 4.7** (Zhipu)
- **GLM 4.7 Flash** (Zhipu)
- **Qwen3 Coder Next** (Alibaba)

**Providers:** Amazon, Anthropic, DeepSeek, Moonshot AI, MiniMax, OpenAI, Zhipu, and others

---

## What's New / Recent Announcements

### 1. Server-side Tools Support in Responses API (January 2026)
- Responses API now supports server-side tools using OpenAI API-compatible service endpoints
- AgentCore Gateway tools integration enabled
- Server-side tool execution without requiring client-side orchestration

### 2. OpenAI-compatible Projects API (February 2026)
- Amazon Bedrock now supports OpenAI-compatible Projects API in the Mantle inference engine

### 3. Anthropic Claude 4.6 Models (February 2026)
- Claude Sonnet 4.6 now available
- Claude Opus 4.6 now available

### 4. Six New Open Weight Models (February 2026)
- DeepSeek V3.2, MiniMax M2.1, GLM 4.7, GLM 4.7 Flash, Kimi K2.5, Qwen3 Coder Next
- Focus: frontier reasoning and agentic coding

---

## Key Capabilities

1. **Model Inference** - Submit prompts and generate responses
2. **Model Customization** - Customize models to improve performance for specific use cases
3. **Enterprise Security** - Secure, enterprise-grade access to foundation models
4. **Flexible APIs** - Multiple API options (OpenAI-compatible, Boto3, custom)
5. **Server-side Tools** - Execute tools without client orchestration

## Deprecations
- **Claude Opus 4**: Legacy (migrate by May 31, 2026)
- **Claude 3.7 Sonnet**: Legacy (migrate by April 28, 2026)

## Note
Last fetched: 2026-04-15. Projects API removed from featured list (was listed in Feb 2026 scan but appears to be consolidated into Mantle engine description). No net-new items since last scan.
